title: RuntimeConfigRedis
description: Redis layout used by dd-runtime-config to back its config control plane. Value types live in @dd/shared-interfaces (RuntimeConfigEntry, RuntimeConfigSubscriber); this schema only declares the canonical key namespace so other services can read the cache directly without duplicating the format string.

$dd:redis.summary: Redis is the storage backend for the runtime-config control plane. Keys are namespaced per env (stage/prod) so the two are fully isolated.

params.name: scope
params.description: Service or logical grouping the entry belongs to.

keys.name: RuntimeConfigEntryIndexKey
keys.description: Redis SET of '{scope}:{key}' members listing every entry that exists in this env.

keys.name: RuntimeConfigGenerationKey
keys.description: Monotonic snapshot generation counter for this env. Bumped on every entry write so subscribers can detect changes.

keys.name: RuntimeConfigSubscriberIndexKey
keys.description: Redis SET of subscriber names registered for this env.
